_meta.do_not_fork: This is the single source of truth for the beginner-class classifier gold set. All consumers read from this canonical path. Do NOT copy/fork into per-project trees — changes go here first, then consumers re-read. Relocated from harvester/test/ to Collab/fixtures/ per AIDI Q5 decision (2026-04-18).
_meta.purpose: Gold-set test fixtures for the forBeginners / beginnerFriendly classifier on Class events. Labels are hand-curated by Harvey against the ruleset sent to Fulton 2026-04-18 (eval order: title-negative → title-positive-forBeginners → title-mixed/friendly-only → description-fallback; superset rule forBeginners⇒beginnerFriendly applied last).
_meta.source: harvester SQLite corpus, distinct Class rows across 24 sites (2026-04-18)

schema.title: Event title (as scraped).
schema.description: Event description (as scraped, truncated to ≤180 chars for readability).

expected.forBeginners: true if the event IS targeted at beginners (organizer-targeted)
expected.beginnerFriendly: true if the event welcomes beginners (superset of forBeginners)

schema.rationale: Short note tying the label to a specific rule in the §-ed ruleset or an edge case.
schema.tags: Bucket labels so consumers can slice the fixture by what they're testing.

_meta.hard_cases: See entries tagged [hard-case]. These are the rows most likely to drive classifier refinement.
v3_rule_changes_applied: Removed Stage 1 title `fundamentals?` positive (ambiguous — used by Int+Adv too).
Removed Stage 3 desc-rule `no partner (needed|required|necessary)` (orthogonal to skill level).
Added niche guard — classifier fires for appId='1' (TangoTiempo) only at v1 launch; niche-independent fixture labels still apply when classifier runs.
v3_fixture_flips: id 21 (Argentine Tango Foundations Class): forBeg true→false, friendly true→false. Confirmed acceptable by Toby.
id 30 (Intermediate + no partner in desc): friendly true→false. No-partner desc-rule removed.
id 46 (CANCELED: Intermediate + no partner in desc): friendly true→false. Same rule removal.

fixtures.title: Tango 1: Absolute Beginner Series
fixtures.rationale: Stage 1 — 'absolute beginner' explicit positive. Tango 1 is a secondary confirmation.

fixtures.title: Absolute Beginner's Tango classes at The Tango Club
fixtures.description: This class is aimed at the complete beginner. We meet at Seeker's Church on the second floor. Fridays from 6pm-7pm starting April 3rd through May 8th we will be giving a 6-week series.
fixtures.rationale: Stage 1 — 'Absolute Beginner' title + 'complete beginner' in description (double confirm).

fixtures.title: WK1 - Argentine Tango for Total Beginners
fixtures.description: An 8-week series for people who are brand new to tango. These 90 minute classes will start your tango journey off on the right foot!
fixtures.rationale: Stage 1 — 'Total Beginners' title + 'brand new to tango' in description.

fixtures.title: Advanced Beginner Toolkit
fixtures.rationale: Stage 1 — 'Advanced Beginner' reads as still-a-beginner (post-novice, pre-intermediate). Ruleset and Fulton lean-yes agree.

fixtures.title: Fábrica Tango Severna Park - Advanced Beginner 3-Week Series: A Deep Dive into Ochos
fixtures.description: Advanced Beginner 3-Week Series: A Deep Dive into Ochos. With Sasha Milentey & Boris De Luca.
fixtures.rationale: Stage 1 — 'Advanced Beginner' positive. Content (ochos) is genuinely introductory-level.

fixtures.title: Argentine Tango: Level 1.5 (Ongoing Beginner)
fixtures.rationale: Stage 1 — 'Ongoing Beginner' is a valid forBeginners phrase (students still self-identify as beginners). Level 1.5 nuance does NOT demote.

fixtures.title: Tango, Beginner Level with Monica Caivano & Gustavo Simplis at Esquina Tango
fixtures.description: Join instructors Gustavo and Monica every Saturday! It's time to learn some Tango! FIRST CLASS IS FREE. No partner needed.
fixtures.rationale: Stage 1 — plain 'Beginner' in title, no mixed-audience qualifier, no negative.

fixtures.title: Tango Argentino Beginner Course
fixtures.rationale: Stage 1 — 'Beginner' + 'Course' (both-signal). EU source (price in euros) — same rules apply.

fixtures.title: Tango Argentino Beginner (Open Level)
fixtures.rationale: Stage 1 wins — 'Beginner' is explicit target despite '(Open Level)' qualifier. (Open Level) signals they don't gatekeep attendance, not that the class is not-for-beginners. forBeginners=true, friendly=true via superset.

fixtures.title: Beginner & Level One Argentine Tango
fixtures.rationale: Stage 1 — 'Beginner' + 'Level One' both positive.

fixtures.title: Intro Argentine Tango Class For Couples
fixtures.rationale: Stage 1 — 'Intro' adjacent to Tango.

fixtures.title: Special Introductory Argentine Tango Lesson
fixtures.rationale: Stage 1 — 'Introductory' covered by `intro(?:ductory|duction)?` in regex.

fixtures.title: Level 1 - Intro to Argentine Tango
fixtures.rationale: Stage 1 — Level 1 + Intro (both positive).

fixtures.title: Intro to Argentine Tango (Level 1 & 2)
fixtures.rationale: Stage 1 — 'Intro' wins. Level 2 qualifier doesn't demote when paired with Intro/Level 1.

fixtures.title: Tango for People New to Tango w/Sharon & Terry
fixtures.description: 7:00 - 9:00 class with Sharon & Terry. $60 for 4 two hour classes.
fixtures.rationale: Stage 1 — 'New to Tango' explicit positive.

fixtures.title: Level 1 - 💃 Argentine Tango @ Go Dance North
fixtures.description: This is a true beginner Argentine Tango class. In this beginning level class you will learn the fundamentals of Argentine Tango.
fixtures.rationale: Stage 1 — 'Level 1' title + 'true beginner' + 'fundamentals' in description.

fixtures.title: Tango 100S: Level 1 Beginner Argentine Tango
fixtures.rationale: Stage 1 — 'Tango 100S' (danceus level-1 convention) + 'Level 1' + 'Beginner'. Triple confirm.

fixtures.title: Tango 100M: Level 1 Beginner Argentine Tango
fixtures.rationale: Same as id 17 — confirms 100M is also level-1 convention. Regex for Tango 100[SM]? must match.

fixtures.title: Beginners & Fundamentals Argentine Tango Class
fixtures.rationale: Stage 1 — 'Beginners' + 'Fundamentals' both positive.

fixtures.title: Argentine Tango: Fundamentals & Technique (Beginner)
fixtures.rationale: Stage 1 — 'Beginner' in title (parenthetical) + 'Fundamentals'. 'Technique' is NOT a negative when 'Beginner' is also present.

fixtures.title: Argentine Tango Foundations Class
fixtures.rationale: Stage 4 (v3) — updated 2026-04-18 per spec v3 rule change 1/2. `fundamentals?` removed from Stage 1 (ambiguous — used by Int+Adv too); `beginners?\s+foundations?` removed as redundant. Standalone 'Foundations' no longer qualifies. Toby confirmed this resolves as neither. Earlier label (forBeg=true) voided.

fixtures.title: Foundations I Tango Class
fixtures.description: This is where we build our foundation as tango dancers. Zero experience necessary. Everyone welcome, no experience necessary, no partner necessary.
fixtures.rationale: Stage 3 — desc 'Zero experience necessary' + 'no experience necessary' (double) + 'everyone welcome' = strong desc-fallback positive. 'Foundations' in title is also a Stage 1 signal (see id 21 ruleset-gap note).

fixtures.title: Tango, All Levels, Mickey Jacobs at Castle Hills
fixtures.description: All levels and no partner needed, hosted by Esquina Tango at Castle Hills Fitness. This community class is $15.
fixtures.rationale: Stage 2 — 'All Levels' is friendly-only (not forBeginners). Desc adds 'no partner needed' — also friendly signal.

fixtures.title: Tango - Nuevo All levels Class
fixtures.rationale: Stage 2 — 'All levels' friendly-only. Nuevo is a style marker, not a level marker.

fixtures.title: Open Level Argentine Tango Class (Tuesday)
fixtures.rationale: Stage 2 — 'Open Level' friendly-only.

fixtures.title: Argentine Tango Beginner & Intermediate Class
fixtures.rationale: Stage 2 — 'Beginner & Intermediate' mixed → friendly-only, NOT forBeginners. This is Fulton's edge case 2.

fixtures.title: Argentine Tango (Beginner/Intermediate)
fixtures.rationale: Stage 2 — slash variant of 'Beginner/Intermediate' mixed.

fixtures.title: Wednesday Tango Break: Beginner & Intermediate Classes
fixtures.rationale: Stage 2 — 'Beginner & Intermediate' mixed.

fixtures.title: Monday Argentine Tango Classes (Chiswick) - Beginners & Improvers
fixtures.rationale: Stage 2 — 'Beginners & Improvers' mixed. 'Improvers' = UK term for advanced-beginner / early-intermediate; treat as mixed not pure-beginner.

fixtures.title: Tango, Intermediate Level with Monica Caivano & Gustavo Simplis at Esquina Tango
fixtures.description: No partner needed. Come work on technique, balance, and styling. Enjoy great exercises that will improve your dancing.
fixtures.rationale: Stage 0 — 'Intermediate' alone = negative for forBeginners. Updated 2026-04-18 per spec v3 rule change 3: 'no partner needed' desc-rule REMOVED (orthogonal to skill level). Nothing else in desc signals friendly. Both false.

fixtures.title: Argentine Tango Intermediate & Advanced
fixtures.rationale: Stage 0 — 'Intermediate & Advanced' title. No beginner signal anywhere. Both flags false.

fixtures.title: Tango 4 Advanced Class
fixtures.rationale: Stage 0 — 'Advanced' alone (Tango 4 confirms high level). Numbered level ≥2 without beginner marker = negative.

fixtures.title: Intermediate & Advanced Tango Class
fixtures.rationale: Stage 0 — both negatives, no beginner.

fixtures.title: Tango 2 + 3: Intermediate Technique
fixtures.rationale: Stage 0 — 'Intermediate' + 'Technique' + 'Tango 2/3'. Triple negative.

fixtures.title: Pre-Intermediate Tango Fundamentals
fixtures.rationale: Stage 0 FIRST — 'Pre-Intermediate' is explicit negative; wins over Stage 1 'Fundamentals'. Demonstrates why eval order matters.

fixtures.title: Beyond Beginner - Queer Tango PDX
fixtures.description: Beyond Beginners - 3 month experience recommended. No partner needed. At Q Tango (Queer Tango PDX), we are committed to being a safe and inclusive space.
fixtures.rationale: Stage 0 — 'Beyond Beginner' is explicit negative. 'No partner needed' in desc would normally set friendly=true, but the explicit '3 month experience recommended' signals post-novice expected; friendly also false. Without the Stage 0 match, naive `\bbeginner\b` would wrongly fire this as forBeginners=true.

fixtures.title: Tango for People Not New to Tango w/Sharon & Terry
fixtures.description: 7:00 - 9:00 Class with Sharon & Terry. $15 for Thursday.
fixtures.rationale: Stage 0 — 'Not new to tango' explicit negative. Contrast with id 15 (same organizer, opposite target).

fixtures.title: Followers Technique: Grounded + Responsive + Connected
fixtures.description: This drop in weekly class is designed for the Followers in Argentine Tango. Starting Thursdays. Finding your grounding, stability and connection.
fixtures.rationale: Stage 0 — 'Technique' alone in title with no beginner signal. Desc doesn't explicitly welcome novices. Conservative label: both false.

fixtures.title: Technique & Tools
fixtures.description: We work on fundamentals at a basic level while learning a tango move. You'll get plenty of personalized attention in this small class.
fixtures.rationale: Stage 0/3 hard case — title 'Technique' leans negative, but desc 'fundamentals at a basic level' suggests accessible. Conservative: forBeginners=false (no explicit title positive), friendly=true (basic-level desc welcomes novices). Tests title-vs-desc tension.

fixtures.title: Level 2 💃 Argentine Tango with Ricardo @ Go Dance
fixtures.description: This is an Argentine Tango class taught by Ricardo Corazon through Go Dance. In this intermediate Argentine Tango class you will be challenged with new patterns, advanced technique.
fixtures.rationale: Stage 0 — 'Level 2' (not Level 1) + desc confirms 'intermediate' and 'advanced technique'. No beginner signal. Tests that Level-N regex must exclude N≥2.

fixtures.title: Date Night - Tango Class
fixtures.description: Looking for a date night that actually brings you closer? Join us for a 30-minute Tango Taster—a simple, beautiful way to reconnect through movement, music, and close embrace. No experience required.
fixtures.rationale: Stage 3 — title generic; desc 'No experience required' + 'Tango Taster' (intro-synonym) = strong desc-positive for forBeginners.

fixtures.title: DelSur Tango Night
fixtures.description: Tango across the dance floor surrounded by the colorful sights, sounds, and foods of Argentina! Attend solo or with friends. No experience necessary.
fixtures.rationale: Stage 3 — title is ambiguous (sounds like a milonga/event, but was category_first=Class at source); desc 'No experience necessary' = strong forBeginners signal. Label reflects desc not title.

fixtures.title: Tango Class and Minipractica with Katerine Ricardo
fixtures.description: 7:30 - 8:30 Open Role Class with Katerine Ricardo in Monterey Park (No partner needed, beginners are welcome) 8:30 - 9:00 Minipractica!
fixtures.rationale: Stage 3 — desc 'beginners are welcome' = friendly-only signal, NOT forBeginners (class isn't targeted at them, just welcoming). Also 'no partner needed'.

fixtures.title: Two Flame Tango - Lv 1
fixtures.description: Tango is both a skillful and deeply connective dance—and we teach both. If you feel drawn to learn: New to tango? Start here.
fixtures.rationale: Stage 1/3 — 'Lv 1' (abbreviation of Level 1) in title + desc 'New to tango? Start here'. Flag: regex for Level-1 should also match 'Lv 1' / 'Lvl 1' abbreviations — noted as ruleset gap.

fixtures.title: Two Flame Tango - Lv 2
fixtures.description: Tango is both a skillful and deeply connective dance—and we teach both. If you feel drawn to learn: New to tango? Start here: https://... Already have experience?
fixtures.rationale: Stage 0 — 'Lv 2' abbreviation = Level 2 = negative. Desc copy is shared boilerplate across their Lv1/Lv2 pages and mentions 'new to tango' but redirects those readers elsewhere. Title wins. Tests that desc 'New to tango?' must NOT override a negative title.

fixtures.title: CANCELED: Tango, Intermediate Level with Monica Caivano & Gustavo Simplis at Esquina Tango
fixtures.description: No partner needed. Come work on technique, balance, and styling.
fixtures.rationale: Same as id 30, prefixed 'CANCELED:'. Classifier must ignore the CANCELED prefix and parse the rest of the title normally. Intermediate → negative forBeginners. Updated 2026-04-18 per spec v3 rule change 3 (no-partner-needed removed): friendly also false.

fixtures.title: CANCELED: Tango, Beginner Level with Monica Caivano & Gustavo Simplis at Esquina Tango
fixtures.description: FIRST CLASS IS FREE. No partner needed.
fixtures.rationale: 'CANCELED' prefix must not suppress the Beginner signal. forBeginners=true as usual. (Note: downstream consumers may separately filter by event cancellation status.)

fixtures.title: FREE Sundays Argentine Tango Dance Lessons
fixtures.rationale: Stage 4 — generic title, no signals in title or desc. Both false. Tests Fulton's edge case 4 (no classification possible → default false).

fixtures.title: Argentine Tango Dance Lessons
fixtures.rationale: Stage 4 — truly generic. Both false.

fixtures.title: Argentine Tango Lessons
fixtures.rationale: Stage 4 — generic. Both false.

fixtures.title: Argentine Tango Level 1
fixtures.rationale: Stage 1 — 'Level 1' standalone. Regex must match word boundary to avoid false match on 'Level 10' etc. (See id 40 for Level 2 contrast.)

fixtures.title: Go Tango Beginner Camp
fixtures.rationale: Stage 1 — 'Beginner Camp' plain beginner with activity qualifier.

fixtures.title: Beginners Argentine Tango Class (Friday)
fixtures.rationale: Stage 1 — plural 'Beginners' should also match — regex `beginners?\b` handles it.

fixtures.title: Beginner's Mind: Argentine Tango
fixtures.rationale: Hard case — 'Beginner's Mind' is a Zen-Buddhist phrase ironically used by experienced teachers to signify 'approach with fresh eyes'. Without desc, ambiguous. Conservative: friendly=true (welcomes learning), forBeginners=false (series is typically not novice-targeted). HTML entity `'` must not break regex. Flag for spec review.

fixtures.title: Beginner's Mind Argentine Tango Class
fixtures.rationale: Same idiom as id 54. Consistent label.

fixtures.title: Beyond Beginner - Queer Tango PDX
fixtures.description: Beyond Beginners - 3 month experience recommended. No partner needed.
fixtures.rationale: Duplicate of id 36 kept intentionally — double-confirms the 'Beyond Beginner' critical-exclusion case. Both consumers will see this.
